title: Eggs on rice
instruction: Fry 2 eggs, serve on reheated/microwave rice, splash of soy.

title: Pasta aglio e olio
instruction: Pasta + garlic gently fried in olive oil + chilli flakes. 12 min.
kid_version: Plain with parmesan; add chilli only to adult bowl

title: Chickpeas on toast
instruction: Warm canned chickpeas in olive oil + garlic, mash lightly, on toast.
kid_version: Chickpeas plain with a little salt

title: Soy-garlic fried rice
instruction: Day-old rice fried with egg, garlic, soy. 10 min.
kid_version: Plain egg fried rice, no soy if they resist

title: Tomato pasta
instruction: Pasta + canned tomato simmered with garlic and olive oil.
kid_version: Plain tomato sauce; scoop kid portion before adding chilli
